subject: Re: Performance Review Cycle
content:
All,

Following up from the Roadmap Sync earlier today. Here are the action
items:

Next meeting: Thursday at 8:30. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,

Leo Perez
VP of Product, Product
